items.summary: The 10-year Treasury yield also rose on Tuesday as renewed volatility in oil markets and continued attacks in the Middle East kept investors on edge.

items.headline: As Iran war causes gas and airfares to spike, lawmakers warn of price gouging — but experts point to supply shocks
items.summary: With airfares and gas prices spiking, some lawmakers are warning of the potential for price gouging, even as experts point to extreme supply shocks.

items.headline: Micron stock sinks for a fourth straight day despite dominant earnings report
items.summary: Micron's revenue almost tripled in the last quarter, but the memory company's stock has sunk about 15% since reporting earnings on Wednesday.

items.headline: United ditches more economy seats to make room for bigger premium cabins with new layouts
items.summary: United will have new cabins on smaller planes with premium seats, including those that convert into a bed, to win more sales from high-spending travelers.

items.headline: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.

items.headline: Circle heads for it worst day on record as proposed law could limit stablecoin yield
items.summary: Earning yield, usually in the form of rewards, on stablecoins like Circle's USDC and others is key incentive for users to hold the coins.

items.headline: Delta suspends 'specialty services' perk for members of Congress, cites DHS shutdown
items.summary: Delta Air Lines' move comes as airports around the U.S. are seeing extra-long security lines as a result of elevated absences by TSA agents.

items.headline: Pakistan offers to facilitate U.S.-Iran war talks as Trump, Tehran give mixed signals
items.summary: Trump said top U.S. negotiators and their Iranian counterparts have been engaged in "very, very strong talks," but Tehran has denied that claim.

items.headline: Iran Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei gets another blue check on X, despite sanctions policy
items.summary: Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, appears to have subscribed to a new X Premium English-language account.

items.headline: OpenAI revamps shopping experience in ChatGPT after struggling with Instant Checkout offering
items.summary: OpenAI said the new experience will make it easier for users to find and compare products.

items.headline: Senate, White House start to coalesce around ending DHS shutdown amid TSA delays
items.summary: The Department of Homeland Security has been shut down since February over Democratic concerns about its immigration enforcement policies.

items.headline: Arm releases first in-house chip, with Meta as debut customer
items.summary: Arm is making its first CPU, pivoting from only licensing its architecture to giants like Apple, Nvidia, Amazon and Google. CNBC got an exclusive first look.

items.headline: The Iran crisis is making this retirement strategy look better than it has in decades
items.summary: Recent wild movements in the bond markets may have created an opportunity.

items.headline: ‘We’re living the simple life’: I was a fisherman and my wife was a nurse. We retired with $6 million. Here’s how we did it.
items.summary: “It probably makes little sense, given our lifestyle, to obsess over retirement accounts.”

items.headline: Here’s how CoreWeave and Nebius can prove the AI doubters wrong
items.summary: The companies are solidifying their positions as leaders in the AI infrastructure market, even as Big Tech companies build their own data centers.

items.headline: Oil rises, with Brent climbing back above $100 as optimism fades over Iran war de-escalation
items.summary: Oil prices traded higher on Tuesday, with international benchmark Brent crude climbing back above $100 per barrel.

items.headline: European stocks close higher as Iran war uncertainty lingers
items.summary: Shares listed in Europe finished higher on Tuesday, as investors continue to monitor developments in the Middle East.

items.headline: ‘This guy has no manners’: My Airbnb guest requested I buy bacon and beer. The $30 bill remains unpaid. Do I insist?
items.summary: “I don’t want him to retaliate with a bad review.”

items.headline: History shows investors are right to worry about 2026 being a bad year for U.S. stocks
items.summary: Investors who are anxious about the struggling stock market amid the Iran conflict have good reason to worry, as they’re contending with all three of the primary causes of particularly bad years since 1928, according to DataTrek Research.

items.headline: Puig stock soars 13% after Estée Lauder confirms takeover talks with Charlotte Tilbury maker
items.summary: Shares of Puig Brands closed 13.4% higher Tuesday after beauty peer Estée Lauder confirmed it is in talks about merging the two companies.

items.headline: We're buying more of this cybersecurity stock as the market keeps getting it wrong
items.summary: We've repeatedly pointed out that we do not think AI will disintermediate traditional cybersecurity vendors.

items.headline: Britain responds to Iran war energy shock by requiring solar panels and heat pumps in all new homes
items.summary: The move comes as part of Britain's response to the Iran war, with the conflict triggering the largest supply disruption in the history of the oil market.

items.headline: 7 software stocks set to thrive in the face of AI uncertainty
items.summary: Microsoft is one software company that William Blair analyst Jason Ader has called out as a likely winner in the age of artificial intelligence.

items.headline: Elizabeth Warren raises alarm over MrBeast’s teen banking app encouraging ‘risky investments’
items.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is raising concerns about a popular YouTuber’s recent venture into financial services with his acquisition of a banking app called Step and its connection to a bank with a troubled history.

items.headline: Pentagon ban of Anthropic faces judge; Claude AI maker seeks injunction
items.summary: The Defense Department designated Anthropic as a risk to U.S. national security, the first time an American company had been hit with that designation.

items.headline: Anthropic says Claude can now use your computer to finish tasks for you in AI agent push
items.summary: Anthropic and its rivals are trying to ramp up capabilities of AI agents after OpenClaw went viral earlier this year.

items.headline: FedEx launches same-day delivery with OneRail as Amazon, Walmart boost their speeds
items.summary: FedEx announced it's partnering with last-mile delivery company OneRail to bring same-day delivery to all of its customers.

items.headline: The surprising reason Americans are working longer than they used to
items.summary: Older workers today have more wealth than previous generations but are afraid to use it.

items.headline: Abivax in no rush for a deal, confident key June trial data can secure better terms for partnerships, CEO tells CNBC
items.summary: Analysts see the biotech company as a prime takeover target and several pharma giants have been rumored as potential buyers.

items.headline: Cases of fraud and improper care are soaring at hospice. Medicare is cracking down.
items.summary: Hospice care has grabbed the attention of the federal government, which is vowing to decertify companies that are overbilling, stealing identities or charging for services never provided.

items.headline: Tesla finally catches a break in Europe
items.summary: Elon Musk’s electric-vehicle maker reported sales growth in the region last month, for the first time in over a year.

items.headline: Gap says it will launch checkout within Google's Gemini, in an AI first from a major fashion company
items.summary: Gap's partnership with Gemini and its customer-facing AI tools give it a competitive edge at a time when winning in specialty retail is harder than ever.

items.headline: Moody's cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow
items.summary: The move by Moody's is the latest sign of distress in private credit; retail investors have been rushing to withdraw funds, from Blackstone to Apollo.

items.headline: Gold prices are steady after heavy sell-off
items.summary: The spot gold price began to settle but remained subdued on Tuesday after a tumultuous start to the week, establishing a level around $4,370 per troy ounce.

items.headline: Iran attacks in Strait of Hormuz are 'economic terrorism against every nation,' UAE oil CEO says
items.summary: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber, CEO of the UAE's state-owned oil company, said the Strait of Hormuz must reopen to resolve the supply shock.

items.headline: Amazon's Zoox to debut robotaxis in Austin, Miami later this year as it awaits paid ride approval
items.summary: It marks the latest expansion for Amazon's Zoox self-driving unit, which opened rides to the public in some parts of Las Vegas and San Francisco last year.

items.headline: Databricks enters cybersecurity market with Lakewatch launch, bulking up ahead of IPO
items.summary: Databricks wants to draw on AI to help organizations respond to a higher speed of attacks, based on newly disclosed vulnerabilities.

items.headline: EV battery startup pivots to defense industry amid Iran war, weak electric vehicle market
items.summary: Former GM executive CEO Pamela Fletcher told CNBC "the faster path, and frankly, a big need, is out there in this defense space."

items.headline: Stagflation alarm bells ring in the euro zone as energy crunch hits the global economy
items.summary: Economists warn stagflation — high inflation and stalling growth — is facing the region because of the Iran war.

items.headline: Alibaba reveals new AI chip designed for 'agents'
items.summary: While much of the attention has focused on GPUs, an area Nvidia dominates, CPUs are seen as key for AI inferencing and agents.

items.headline: Pro Padel League raises $15 million as investors bet on sport’s U.S. growth
items.summary: The Pro Padel League has raised $15 million in new funding as it looks to accelerate its next phase of growth in the U.S.

items.headline: Amazon faces further AWS disruption in the Middle East from Iran conflict
items.summary: AWS is facing more service disruptions in Bahrain as a result of the ongoing conflict ‌in the Middle East, marking the second such disruptions this month.

items.headline: DCCC launches geotargeted digital ad campaign hitting GOP for gas prices
items.summary: Democrats have seized on the economic disruption of the Iran war to hammer Republicans over high costs ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.

items.headline: British fintech Revolut reports record annual profit as it gears up for U.S. push
items.summary: The startup, which hit a $75 billion valuation in 2025, is one of Europe's most valuable private tech companies.

items.headline: White House to pay TotalEnergies $1 billion to kill off East Coast wind farm projects
items.summary: The announcement comes as the Iran war disrupts global oil and gas supplies, making the U.S.' development of its LNG resources more urgent.

items.headline: EU, Australia seal trade deal as Western countries hedge against U.S. risks
items.summary: The EU and Australia agreed to a sweeping trade deal, the latest move by U.S. allies to rethink their economic ties amid deepening geopolitical uncertainty.

items.headline: Gold at $10,000? Market watchers hold firm on forecasts despite bullion bear market slide
items.summary: Gold's sharp selloff may have pushed the metal firmly into bear market territory, but some market veterans are sticking to ambitious long-term forecasts.

items.headline: Apollo gives investors only 45% of requested withdrawals from $15 billion private credit fund
items.summary: The withdrawals show that Apollo didn't avoid the rush of investor redemptions plaguing rivals, driven by concern over private credit loans to software firms.

items.headline: OpenAI calls out Microsoft reliance as risk in investor document ahead of expected IPO
items.summary: In a document that resembles an IPO prospectus, OpenAI highlighted the risk of its dependence on Microsoft and of supply disruptions at TSMC.

items.headline: Microsoft stock may be in a slump. But here’s why it is wrong to give up now
items.summary: Things keep lining up against Microsoft.

items.headline: Democrat Emily Gregory wants to represent Trump — and his Mar-a-Lago resort — in Florida's legislature
items.summary: Democrat Emily Gregory is hoping to score an upset for a seat in the Florida state House representing President Donald Trump.

items.headline: WNBPA President Nneka Ogwumike says new CBA will have a major impact on players' bank accounts
items.summary: WNBPA President Nneka Ogwumike told CNBC significant pay raises for WNBA players could change their off-season routines.

items.headline: Synopsys shares rally as activist Elliott builds multibillion-dollar stake in chip design firm
items.summary: Elliott did not disclose the exact value of its investment, but described Synopsys as "essential to the global chip industry."

items.headline: Here's how Jim Cramer is playing Monday's stock market rebound
items.summary: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

items.headline: BTS comeback draws a smaller crowd than hoped, hitting parent company Hybe's shares
items.summary: Shares in Hybe, the parent company of South Korean boyband BTS, fell 15% on Monday as their much-anticipated comeback drew a smaller crowd than expected.

items.headline: Sen. Warren questions DOD about Anthropic blacklist that 'appears to be retaliation'
items.summary: Warren sent letters to Pete Hegseth and Sam Altman, asking for additional details of OpenAI's contract with the defense department and Anthropic's blacklisting.
